meta.note_en: Likely motions for junior English debate in China (NSDA Junior / NHSDLC Junior style): life-oriented, beginner-friendly. Scan fast, grab the points you like.
meta.note_zh: 根据中国小学英文辩论赛（NSDA Junior / NHSDLC Junior 风格）预测：生活化、适合初级选手。快速浏览，挑你喜欢的点记下来。

topics.title_en: Should exams be banned?
topics.title_zh: 应该取消考试吗？

pro.en: Exams make kids so stressed they can't sleep.
pro.zh: 考试压力大到睡不着觉。

pro.en: Real learning is more than memorizing for a test.
pro.zh: 真正的学习不只是背书应付考试。

pro.en: One bad day shouldn't decide your whole grade.
pro.zh: 一次发挥不好，不该决定全部成绩。

con.en: Exams show what you have really learned.
con.zh: 考试能看出你是不是真学会了。

con.en: They prepare you for bigger tests later in life.
con.zh: 为以后更大的考试打基础。

con.en: A goal to study for keeps you focused.
con.zh: 有考试这个目标，学习才有动力。

topics.title_en: Should students grade their teachers?
topics.title_zh: 学生应该给老师打分吗？

pro.en: Teachers can learn what helps kids most.
pro.zh: 老师能知道哪种教法对学生最有用。

pro.en: Students know which lessons are boring.
pro.zh: 学生最清楚哪节课无聊。

pro.en: It makes school feel fair for everyone.
pro.zh: 让学校对每个人都更公平。

con.en: Kids might give low scores just for fun homework.
con.zh: 孩子可能只因为作业少就打高分。

con.en: Teachers could feel scared to be strict.
con.zh: 老师会不敢严格要求。

con.en: A strict teacher is sometimes the best teacher.
con.zh: 严格的老师有时才是最好的老师。

topics.title_en: Should recess be longer?
topics.title_zh: 课间休息应该更长吗？

pro.en: Kids think better after running around.
pro.zh: 跑跑跳跳后脑子更清醒。

pro.en: Playtime teaches teamwork and making friends.
pro.zh: 玩耍能学会团队合作和交朋友。

pro.en: Sitting too long is bad for your body.
pro.zh: 坐太久对身体不好。

con.en: Less class time means learning less.
con.zh: 上课时间变少，学的东西也少。

con.en: Some kids get hurt during long breaks.
con.zh: 休息太久，有些孩子会受伤。

con.en: It's hard to calm down after too much play.
con.zh: 玩太久后很难安静下来上课。

topics.title_en: Should kids learn to code at school?
topics.title_zh: 小学应该教编程吗？

pro.en: Computers are part of almost every job today.
pro.zh: 现在几乎每个工作都要用电脑。

pro.en: Coding teaches you to solve problems step by step.
pro.zh: 编程教你一步步解决问题。

pro.en: Kids can build their own games and apps.
pro.zh: 孩子能自己做游戏和 App。

con.en: Young kids should learn reading and math first.
con.zh: 小孩应该先学好阅读和数学。

con.en: Too much screen time hurts the eyes.
con.zh: 对着屏幕太久伤眼睛。

con.en: Not every kid will work with computers.
con.zh: 不是每个孩子以后都用电脑工作。

topics.title_en: Should homework be replaced by daily reading?
topics.title_zh: 作业应该用每天阅读来代替吗？

pro.en: Reading makes you smarter in every subject.
pro.zh: 阅读让你各科都变聪明。

pro.en: Kids enjoy reading more than worksheets.
pro.zh: 孩子喜欢读书多过做练习卷。

pro.en: Good readers write and speak better too.
pro.zh: 爱读书的孩子写作和说话也更好。

con.en: Math needs practice, not just reading.
con.zh: 数学需要练习，光读书不够。

con.en: Some kids would read the same easy book again.
con.zh: 有些孩子会一直读同一本简单的书。

con.en: Homework teaches you to finish a task on time.
con.zh: 作业教你按时完成任务。

topics.title_en: Should students choose their own subjects?
topics.title_zh: 学生应该自己选课吗？

pro.en: Kids learn faster when they like the subject.
pro.zh: 学喜欢的科目学得更快。

pro.en: Everyone is good at different things.
pro.zh: 每个人擅长的东西不一样。

pro.en: Choosing makes kids feel grown-up and responsible.
pro.zh: 自己选课让孩子更有责任感。

con.en: Kids might drop subjects they actually need.
con.zh: 孩子可能放掉真正需要的科目。

con.en: You can't know you like something you never tried.
con.zh: 没试过的东西，怎么知道喜不喜欢。

con.en: A wide base helps you in the future.
con.zh: 学得广，将来路才宽。

topics.title_en: Should school start later in the morning?
topics.title_zh: 学校应该晚一点上课吗？

pro.en: Kids who sleep more learn better.
pro.zh: 睡够的孩子学得更好。

pro.en: Many students fall asleep in early classes.
pro.zh: 很多学生第一节课就打瞌睡。

pro.en: A calm morning means a happier day.
pro.zh: 早上不慌张，一整天心情好。

con.en: Parents need to leave for work early.
con.zh: 爸妈要早早去上班。

con.en: Later school means later dinner and bedtime.
con.zh: 上学晚，吃饭睡觉都跟着晚。

con.en: Less daytime left for sports and play.
con.zh: 白天玩和运动的时间变少。

topics.title_en: Should every class have fewer students?
topics.title_zh: 每个班的人数应该更少吗？

pro.en: The teacher can help each kid more.
pro.zh: 老师能更多地帮到每个孩子。

pro.en: It's easier to ask questions in a small class.
pro.zh: 班级小，更敢举手提问。

pro.en: Less noise means easier to focus.
pro.zh: 人少更安静，更容易专心。

con.en: Schools would need many more teachers.
con.zh: 学校得请多很多老师。

con.en: Big classes help you make more friends.
con.zh: 人多的班能交更多朋友。

con.en: Some kids learn well by helping each other.
con.zh: 有些孩子互相帮忙才学得好。

topics.title_en: Should kids repeat a grade if they fail?
topics.title_zh: 考不好应该留级吗？

pro.en: A second year helps you really understand.
pro.zh: 多读一年能真正学懂。

pro.en: It's better than moving on confused.
pro.zh: 比稀里糊涂升上去强。

pro.en: Strong basics make the next year easier.
pro.zh: 基础打牢，下一年更轻松。

con.en: Leaving your friends feels very lonely.
con.zh: 离开好朋友会很孤单。

con.en: It can make a kid feel like a failure.
con.zh: 会让孩子觉得自己很失败。

con.en: Extra help after class can work better.
con.zh: 课后多辅导可能更有用。

topics.title_en: Should art and music be as important as math?
topics.title_zh: 美术和音乐应该和数学一样重要吗？

pro.en: Art and music make kids creative.
pro.zh: 美术和音乐培养创造力。

pro.en: Not everyone becomes a scientist.
pro.zh: 不是每个人都当科学家。

pro.en: Making music makes people happy and calm.
pro.zh: 玩音乐让人开心又放松。

con.en: Math is used in almost every job.
con.zh: 数学几乎所有工作都用得到。

con.en: You can do art and music as a hobby.
con.zh: 美术音乐可以当兴趣爱好。

con.en: Weak math closes many doors later.
con.zh: 数学差，以后很多路都走不通。

topics.title_en: Should kids have their own smartphone?
topics.title_zh: 小孩应该有自己的智能手机吗？

pro.en: Parents can reach you anytime for safety.
pro.zh: 爸妈随时联系得上，更安全。

pro.en: You can look things up and learn fast.
pro.zh: 随时查资料，学得快。

pro.en: Kids learn to manage their own time.
pro.zh: 孩子学会管理自己的时间。

con.en: Phones are easy to get addicted to.
con.zh: 手机很容易上瘾。

con.en: Too much screen time hurts sleep and eyes.
con.zh: 看太久伤睡眠也伤眼睛。

con.en: Kids might see things made for grown-ups.
con.zh: 孩子可能看到大人才该看的东西。

topics.title_en: Should there be a limit on screen time?
topics.title_zh: 应该限制看屏幕的时间吗？

pro.en: Your eyes need a rest from screens.
pro.zh: 眼睛需要离开屏幕休息。

pro.en: A limit leaves time to play outside.
pro.zh: 有限制才有时间去户外玩。

pro.en: Too much screen makes it hard to sleep.
pro.zh: 看太多屏幕会睡不好。

con.en: Not all screen time is bad — some is learning.
con.zh: 不是所有屏幕时间都坏，有些是学习。

con.en: Kids should learn to control it themselves.
con.zh: 孩子应该学会自己控制。

con.en: A strict rule can start big fights at home.
con.zh: 硬性规定容易在家里引起争吵。

topics.title_en: Should kids use social media?
topics.title_zh: 小孩应该玩社交媒体吗？

pro.en: You can stay in touch with faraway friends.
pro.zh: 能和远方的朋友保持联系。

pro.en: Kids share art, ideas, and learn from others.
pro.zh: 可以分享作品、想法，向别人学习。

pro.en: It's part of the world kids live in today.
pro.zh: 这是孩子今天生活的一部分。

con.en: Some people are mean and bully online.
con.zh: 网上有人刻薄、会欺负人。

con.en: Comparing yourself to others makes you sad.
con.zh: 总和别人比，会让自己难过。

con.en: Strangers can pretend to be someone else.
con.zh: 陌生人可以假装成别人。

topics.title_en: Should robots do our chores?
topics.title_zh: 机器人应该帮我们做家务吗？

pro.en: Families get more time together.
pro.zh: 家人能有更多相处时间。

pro.en: Robots never get tired or complain.
pro.zh: 机器人不会累，也不会抱怨。

pro.en: They can help old or sick people a lot.
pro.zh: 能帮上年纪或生病的人大忙。

con.en: Doing chores teaches kids responsibility.
con.zh: 做家务能培养孩子的责任感。

con.en: Robots are very expensive to buy.
con.zh: 机器人买起来很贵。

con.en: If a robot breaks, no one knows how to help.
con.zh: 机器人坏了，没人会做家务了。

topics.title_en: Should schools use tablets instead of textbooks?
topics.title_zh: 学校应该用平板代替课本吗？

pro.en: One tablet holds all your books — no heavy bag.
pro.zh: 一块平板装下所有书，书包不重。

pro.en: Videos and games make lessons fun.
pro.zh: 视频和小游戏让上课更有趣。

pro.en: It saves a lot of paper and trees.
pro.zh: 省下很多纸，也救了树。

con.en: It's easy to play games instead of studying.
con.zh: 很容易玩游戏不学习。

con.en: Tablets break, and the battery dies.
con.zh: 平板会坏，电也会用光。

con.en: Writing by hand helps you remember.
con.zh: 手写更能记住知识。

topics.title_en: Should kids learn to type instead of handwrite?
topics.title_zh: 应该学打字，而不是手写吗？

pro.en: Typing is faster for long work.
pro.zh: 写长东西，打字更快。

pro.en: Most grown-up jobs use a keyboard.
pro.zh: 大人的工作大多用键盘。

pro.en: Typed work is neat and easy to read.
pro.zh: 打出来的字工整、好认。

con.en: Writing by hand helps your brain remember.
con.zh: 手写帮大脑记得更牢。

con.en: You can't always carry a keyboard.
con.zh: 不可能随身带键盘。

con.en: Beautiful handwriting is a real skill.
con.zh: 一手好字是真本事。

topics.title_en: Can video calls replace visiting friends?
topics.title_zh: 视频通话能代替见面吗？

pro.en: You can talk to friends in other cities anytime.
pro.zh: 随时和外地的朋友聊天。

pro.en: It saves long travel time.
pro.zh: 省下长长的路上时间。

pro.en: You still see their face and smile.
pro.zh: 还是能看见对方的脸和笑容。

con.en: You can't play tag through a screen.
con.zh: 隔着屏幕没法一起玩抓人。

con.en: A real hug feels better than a call.
con.zh: 真实的拥抱比通话温暖。

con.en: The internet can freeze and cut you off.
con.zh: 网络会卡、会断。

topics.title_en: Should AI choose what books we read?
topics.title_zh: 应该让 AI 帮我们选书读吗？

pro.en: AI knows what you like and finds it fast.
pro.zh: AI 知道你喜欢什么，找得快。

pro.en: It can suggest books you never knew about.
pro.zh: 能推荐你从没听过的好书。

pro.en: No more wasting time picking.
pro.zh: 不用浪费时间挑来挑去。

con.en: AI only shows what you already like — never new.
con.zh: AI 只给你喜欢的，永远碰不到新东西。

con.en: Finding a surprise book yourself is exciting.
con.zh: 自己淘到惊喜的书很兴奋。

con.en: A teacher or friend gives warmer tips.
con.zh: 老师或朋友的推荐更有温度。

topics.title_en: Should we all eat less meat to help the planet?
topics.title_zh: 为了地球，大家应该少吃肉吗？

pro.en: Raising animals uses huge amounts of water.
pro.zh: 养殖动物要用大量的水。

pro.en: Eating more plants is healthier for kids.
pro.zh: 多吃蔬菜对孩子更健康。

pro.en: Less meat means fewer forests cut down.
pro.zh: 少吃肉，就少砍森林。

con.en: Growing kids need protein from meat.
con.zh: 长身体的孩子需要肉里的蛋白质。

con.en: People should choose their own food.
con.zh: 吃什么应该自己决定。

con.en: Some families have eaten meat for generations.
con.zh: 有些家庭世代都吃肉。

topics.title_en: Should cars be banned from city centers?
topics.title_zh: 市中心应该禁止汽车吗？

pro.en: The air gets much cleaner to breathe.
pro.zh: 空气会干净很多。

pro.en: Kids can walk and bike more safely.
pro.zh: 孩子走路骑车更安全。

pro.en: Quieter streets are nicer for everyone.
pro.zh: 街道更安静，大家都舒服。

con.en: Some people can't walk far, like grandparents.
con.zh: 有些人走不了远路，比如爷爷奶奶。

con.en: Shops may lose customers who drive in.
con.zh: 开车来的顾客少了，商店生意差。

con.en: Buses and bikes can't carry everything.
con.zh: 公交和自行车装不下所有东西。

topics.title_en: Should recycling be a rule for everyone?
topics.title_zh: 回收垃圾应该是每个人必须遵守的规定吗？

pro.en: Recycling saves trees, water, and energy.
pro.zh: 回收能省树、省水、省能源。

pro.en: Less trash means cleaner oceans and parks.
pro.zh: 垃圾少了，海洋和公园更干净。

pro.en: If everyone helps, the change is huge.
pro.zh: 人人都做，改变就很大。

con.en: Sorting trash takes time and is confusing.
con.zh: 分类垃圾费时间，又容易搞混。

con.en: Teaching works better than forcing.
con.zh: 教育比强迫更有用。

con.en: Some places have no recycling bins yet.
con.zh: 有些地方还没有回收桶。

topics.title_en: Should wasting food be against the rules?
topics.title_zh: 浪费食物应该被禁止吗？

pro.en: Millions of people don't have enough to eat.
pro.zh: 还有几百万人吃不饱。

pro.en: Throwing food away wastes water and land.
pro.zh: 倒掉食物就是浪费水和土地。

pro.en: It teaches kids to be thankful.
pro.zh: 教孩子懂得珍惜。

con.en: You can't always finish food that's gone bad.
con.zh: 坏掉的食物没法硬吃完。

con.en: Forcing kids to eat can make them sick.
con.zh: 逼孩子吃光可能吃坏肚子。

con.en: Sharing leftovers works better than a rule.
con.zh: 把剩饭分享出去比定规矩更好。

topics.title_en: Should every school have a garden?
topics.title_zh: 每个学校都应该有花园吗？

pro.en: Kids learn where food really comes from.
pro.zh: 孩子明白食物是怎么来的。

pro.en: Plants make the air and mood better.
pro.zh: 植物让空气和心情都变好。

pro.en: Growing things teaches patience.
pro.zh: 种东西能培养耐心。

con.en: Gardens cost money and need care every day.
con.zh: 花园要花钱，还得天天打理。

con.en: Not every school has the space.
con.zh: 不是每个学校都有地方。

con.en: That time could be used for other lessons.
con.zh: 那些时间可以用来上别的课。

topics.title_en: Should wild animals ever be kept as pets?
topics.title_zh: 野生动物可以当宠物养吗？

pro.en: Some hurt animals are safer with people.
pro.zh: 有些受伤的动物跟着人更安全。

pro.en: Caring for one teaches kids about nature.
pro.zh: 照顾它能让孩子了解大自然。

pro.en: Rescue centers save animals that can't survive alone.
pro.zh: 救助站能救活无法独自生存的动物。

con.en: Wild animals belong in the wild, free.
con.zh: 野生动物属于自由的野外。

con.en: They can be dangerous as they grow big.
con.zh: 长大后可能很危险。

con.en: Most homes can't give them what they need.
con.zh: 大多数家庭给不了它们需要的。

topics.title_en: Should we plant a new tree for every tree we cut?
topics.title_zh: 砍一棵树就该种一棵新树吗？

pro.en: Trees make the air we breathe.
pro.zh: 树制造我们呼吸的空气。

pro.en: New trees give animals a home.
pro.zh: 新树给动物一个家。

pro.en: It keeps forests from disappearing.
pro.zh: 森林就不会慢慢消失。

con.en: A new tree takes many years to grow big.
con.zh: 新树要很多年才长大。

con.en: It's hard to check that everyone does it.
con.zh: 很难检查每个人都做到了。

con.en: Saving old forests matters even more.
con.zh: 保护老森林更重要。

topics.title_en: Should plastic toys be banned?
topics.title_zh: 应该禁止塑料玩具吗？

pro.en: Broken plastic toys pollute for hundreds of years.
pro.zh: 坏掉的塑料玩具污染几百年。

pro.en: Wooden toys last longer and are safer.
pro.zh: 木头玩具更耐用、更安全。

pro.en: Kids have too many toys they forget anyway.
pro.zh: 孩子的玩具多到根本玩不过来。

con.en: Plastic toys are cheap so all kids can have them.
con.zh: 塑料玩具便宜，每个孩子都买得起。

con.en: We can recycle them instead of banning.
con.zh: 可以回收，不一定要禁止。

con.en: Many favorite toys are only made in plastic.
con.zh: 很多最爱的玩具只有塑料款。

topics.title_en: Should kids do chores at home?
topics.title_zh: 小孩应该做家务吗？

pro.en: Chores teach you to take care of yourself.
pro.zh: 家务教你照顾自己。

pro.en: It's fair when the whole family helps.
pro.zh: 全家一起做才公平。

pro.en: You feel proud after finishing a job.
pro.zh: 做完一件事会很有成就感。

con.en: Kids already have school and homework.
con.zh: 孩子已经有学校和作业了。

con.en: Some chores are unsafe for little kids.
con.zh: 有些家务对小孩不安全。

con.en: Playtime is important for growing up too.
con.zh: 玩耍对成长也很重要。

topics.title_en: Should kids decide their own bedtime?
topics.title_zh: 小孩应该自己决定几点睡吗？

pro.en: Kids learn to listen to their own body.
pro.zh: 孩子学会听自己身体的信号。

pro.en: Choosing teaches responsibility.
pro.zh: 自己做决定能学会负责。

pro.en: Some kids really do focus better at night.
pro.zh: 有些孩子晚上确实更专注。

con.en: Kids need lots of sleep to grow.
con.zh: 孩子要睡够才能长身体。

con.en: Late nights make morning class hard.
con.zh: 睡太晚，早上上课很困。

con.en: Without a rule, fun always wins over sleep.
con.zh: 没规定，玩永远赢过睡觉。

topics.title_en: Should kids get paid for good grades?
topics.title_zh: 考得好应该拿钱奖励吗？

pro.en: A reward gives you a reason to try hard.
pro.zh: 有奖励就有努力的理由。

pro.en: It feels great to earn your own money.
pro.zh: 靠自己挣钱感觉很棒。

pro.en: It's like how grown-ups get paid for good work.
pro.zh: 就像大人工作好就有报酬。

con.en: You should learn for yourself, not for money.
con.zh: 学习是为自己，不是为了钱。

con.en: Kids may cheat just to get the reward.
con.zh: 孩子可能为了钱去作弊。

con.en: When the money stops, so does the effort.
con.zh: 没钱了，努力也停了。

topics.title_en: Should a family share just one screen at home?
topics.title_zh: 一家人在家应该只用一块屏幕吗？

pro.en: The family watches and talks together.
pro.zh: 全家一起看、一起聊。

pro.en: Less screen time for everyone.
pro.zh: 每个人的屏幕时间都变少。

pro.en: Kids can't hide what they watch.
pro.zh: 孩子没法偷偷看东西。

con.en: Everyone likes different shows.
con.zh: 每个人喜欢的节目不一样。

con.en: Parents may need a screen for work.
con.zh: 爸妈工作可能要用屏幕。

con.en: Fighting over one screen causes arguments.
con.zh: 抢一块屏幕容易吵架。

topics.title_en: Should kids be allowed to vote?
topics.title_zh: 小孩应该有投票权吗？

pro.en: Choices made today shape the kids' future.
pro.zh: 今天的决定影响孩子的未来。

pro.en: Voting young teaches kids to care.
pro.zh: 从小投票教孩子关心社会。

pro.en: Kids have smart ideas adults miss.
pro.zh: 孩子有大人想不到的好点子。

con.en: Big choices need lots of life experience.
con.zh: 重大决定需要丰富的人生经验。

con.en: Kids could be easily tricked into a choice.
con.zh: 孩子容易被骗着投票。

con.en: Kids can learn first and vote when older.
con.zh: 可以先学，长大再投。

topics.title_en: Should grandparents live with the family?
topics.title_zh: 爷爷奶奶应该和家人住在一起吗？

pro.en: Grandparents share wonderful stories and skills.
pro.zh: 祖辈能讲故事、教手艺。

pro.en: The family can care for them as they age.
pro.zh: 他们老了，家人能照顾。

pro.en: Kids grow up close to their family roots.
pro.zh: 孩子从小和家族的根更亲。

con.en: Homes can get crowded and noisy.
con.zh: 家里会变得拥挤又吵。

con.en: Grown-ups may argue about how to raise kids.
con.zh: 大人可能为怎么带孩子吵架。

con.en: Grandparents may want their own quiet space.
con.zh: 祖辈可能想要自己安静的空间。

topics.title_en: Should kids travel to other countries while young?
topics.title_zh: 小孩应该趁小多去别的国家旅行吗？

pro.en: Seeing the world teaches more than books.
pro.zh: 看世界学到的比书本多。

pro.en: Kids learn that people live in many ways.
pro.zh: 孩子明白人们有各种生活方式。

pro.en: Trying new food and languages is fun.
pro.zh: 尝新食物、学新语言很有趣。

con.en: Travel costs a lot of money.
con.zh: 旅行很花钱。

con.en: Young kids forget most of the trip.
con.zh: 小孩大多会忘掉旅行的事。

con.en: Missing school can set learning back.
con.zh: 缺课会落下功课。

topics.title_en: Should junk food be banned at school?
topics.title_zh: 学校应该禁止垃圾食品吗？

pro.en: Healthy food helps kids focus and grow.
pro.zh: 健康食物帮孩子专注、长高。

pro.en: Too much junk food makes kids sick.
pro.zh: 吃太多垃圾食品会生病。

pro.en: School should teach good habits.
pro.zh: 学校应该教好习惯。

con.en: A treat once in a while is okay.
con.zh: 偶尔吃点没关系。

con.en: Kids should learn to choose, not be forced.
con.zh: 孩子应学会选择，而不是被强迫。

con.en: Kids may just buy junk food outside.
con.zh: 孩子可能跑到校外去买。

topics.title_en: Should sugary drinks be banned for kids?
topics.title_zh: 应该禁止小孩喝含糖饮料吗？

pro.en: Too much sugar rots your teeth.
pro.zh: 糖太多会蛀牙。

pro.en: Water and milk are far healthier.
pro.zh: 水和牛奶健康得多。

pro.en: Sugar highs make it hard to focus in class.
pro.zh: 糖吃多了上课坐不住。

con.en: One drink at a party is no big deal.
con.zh: 聚会喝一杯没什么大不了。

con.en: Kids should learn balance, not bans.
con.zh: 应学会适量，而不是一刀切。

con.en: Banning makes kids want it even more.
con.zh: 越禁孩子越想喝。

topics.title_en: Should every kid play a sport?
topics.title_zh: 每个小孩都应该做一项运动吗？

pro.en: Sport keeps your body strong and healthy.
pro.zh: 运动让身体强壮健康。

pro.en: Team sports teach teamwork and rules.
pro.zh: 团队运动教合作和规则。

pro.en: Exercise lifts your mood after a hard day.
pro.zh: 累了一天，运动能让心情变好。

con.en: Some kids prefer music, art, or chess.
con.zh: 有些孩子喜欢音乐、美术或象棋。

con.en: Forcing sport can make kids hate it.
con.zh: 逼着做运动会让孩子讨厌它。

con.en: Some kids get hurt or feel left out.
con.zh: 有些孩子会受伤或被冷落。

topics.title_en: Should school lunch be free for everyone?
topics.title_zh: 学校午餐应该对所有人免费吗？

pro.en: No hungry kid is too tired to learn.
pro.zh: 没有饿肚子的孩子，没人因饿而学不进。

pro.en: All kids eat the same, so no one feels poor.
pro.zh: 大家吃一样的，没人觉得自己穷。

pro.en: Parents have one less thing to worry about.
pro.zh: 爸妈少操一份心。

con.en: Free lunch costs the school a lot.
con.zh: 免费午餐学校要花很多钱。

con.en: Some kids like bringing food from home.
con.zh: 有些孩子喜欢自带饭菜。

con.en: Free food can get wasted more easily.
con.zh: 免费的食物更容易被浪费。

topics.title_en: Is sleep more important than studying?
topics.title_zh: 睡觉比学习更重要吗？

pro.en: A tired brain can't remember anything.
pro.zh: 累坏的大脑什么都记不住。

pro.en: Sleep is when your body grows.
pro.zh: 身体是在睡觉时长大的。

pro.en: Well-rested kids are happier and kinder.
pro.zh: 睡好的孩子更开心、更友善。

con.en: Without studying, you fall behind.
con.zh: 不学习就会落后。

con.en: You can plan time for both.
con.zh: 可以安排好两者的时间。

con.en: Big goals sometimes need a late night.
con.zh: 为大目标偶尔熬夜也值得。

topics.title_en: Should kids eat breakfast every day before school?
topics.title_zh: 上学前每天都应该吃早餐吗？

pro.en: Breakfast gives you energy to think.
pro.zh: 早餐给你思考的能量。

pro.en: Hungry kids can't focus by mid-morning.
pro.zh: 饿着的孩子上午就坐不住了。

pro.en: It's the start of a healthy day.
pro.zh: 健康一天的开始。

con.en: Some kids feel sick eating too early.
con.zh: 有些孩子太早吃会想吐。

con.en: Rushing to eat causes stress in the morning.
con.zh: 赶着吃早饭让早上很慌乱。

con.en: A later snack can work just as well.
con.zh: 晚点吃个加餐一样行。

topics.title_en: Are video games good for kids?
topics.title_zh: 电子游戏对小孩有好处吗？

pro.en: Games teach you to solve problems fast.
pro.zh: 游戏教你快速解决问题。

pro.en: Many games are played in English.
pro.zh: 很多游戏是英文的，能练英语。

pro.en: Playing with friends online is teamwork.
pro.zh: 和朋友联机也是团队合作。

con.en: Games are easy to play for too long.
con.zh: 游戏很容易一玩就停不下来。

con.en: Some games are too violent for kids.
con.zh: 有些游戏对孩子太暴力。

con.en: Too much gaming means less time outside.
con.zh: 玩太多，户外时间就没了。

topics.title_en: Are books better than movies?
topics.title_zh: 书比电影更好吗？

pro.en: Books let your imagination picture it all.
pro.zh: 看书能让想象力自己描绘画面。

pro.en: Reading grows your vocabulary.
pro.zh: 阅读能扩大词汇量。

pro.en: A book tells you what characters think.
pro.zh: 书能告诉你角色心里在想什么。

con.en: Movies show the story in a fun, fast way.
con.zh: 电影把故事讲得快又有趣。

con.en: You can enjoy a movie with friends together.
con.zh: 可以和朋友一起看电影。

con.en: Some stories look amazing on screen.
con.zh: 有些故事在大银幕上特别震撼。

topics.title_en: Should weekends be homework-free?
topics.title_zh: 周末应该没有作业吗？

pro.en: Kids need real rest after a long week.
pro.zh: 累了一周，孩子需要真正休息。

pro.en: Weekends are for family and friends.
pro.zh: 周末是留给家人和朋友的。

pro.en: A rested kid learns better on Monday.
pro.zh: 休息好，周一学得更好。

con.en: A little practice keeps lessons fresh.
con.zh: 练一点点能保持记忆。

con.en: Weekends give time for big projects.
con.zh: 周末有时间做大作业。

con.en: Without any, some kids forget by Monday.
con.zh: 完全不做，有些孩子周一就忘光。

topics.title_en: Should summer holidays be longer?
topics.title_zh: 暑假应该更长吗？

pro.en: Long breaks let kids try camps and hobbies.
pro.zh: 长假能去夏令营、玩兴趣。

pro.en: Everyone comes back fresh and ready.
pro.zh: 回来后精神满满。

pro.en: Families can take longer trips together.
pro.zh: 全家能一起长途旅行。

con.en: Kids forget a lot over a long break.
con.zh: 假太长，学的东西忘很多。

con.en: Working parents have no one to watch kids.
con.zh: 上班的爸妈没人看孩子。

con.en: Too much free time gets boring.
con.zh: 太闲反而无聊。

topics.title_en: Do comics count as real reading?
topics.title_zh: 看漫画算真正的阅读吗？

pro.en: Comics get kids who hate books to read.
pro.zh: 漫画能让不爱书的孩子开始读。

pro.en: Pictures plus words tell rich stories.
pro.zh: 图加字能讲很丰富的故事。

pro.en: Many comics use clever, fun language.
pro.zh: 很多漫画的语言又巧又有趣。

con.en: Comics have fewer words to learn from.
con.zh: 漫画字少，学到的词不多。

con.en: Pictures do the work your brain should.
con.zh: 图替你想了，大脑就偷懒。

con.en: Long books build longer focus.
con.zh: 读长书能练更长的专注力。

topics.title_en: Should kids watch cartoons in any language?
topics.title_zh: 小孩可以看任何语言的动画片吗？

pro.en: You pick up new languages without trying.
pro.zh: 不知不觉学会新语言。

pro.en: You learn about other countries and ways of life.
pro.zh: 了解别的国家和生活方式。

pro.en: Subtitles help you read along.
pro.zh: 字幕还能帮你跟读。

con.en: You may miss jokes in a language you don't know.
con.zh: 听不懂的语言会错过笑点。

con.en: It's tiring to read subtitles the whole time.
con.zh: 一直看字幕很累。

con.en: First get strong in your own language.
con.zh: 先把母语学扎实。

topics.title_en: Is winning more important than having fun?
topics.title_zh: 赢比开心更重要吗？

pro.en: Trying to win makes you give your best.
pro.zh: 想赢才会拼尽全力。

pro.en: Winning feels amazing after hard work.
pro.zh: 努力后赢了，感觉超棒。

pro.en: The world rewards people who aim high.
pro.zh: 这个世界奖励有追求的人。

con.en: If only winning matters, losing crushes you.
con.zh: 只看输赢，输了会很受打击。

con.en: You make friends by having fun, not winning.
con.zh: 交朋友靠开心，不是靠赢。

con.en: Fun is why we play games at all.
con.zh: 开心本来就是玩的意义。

topics.title_en: Is it always best to tell the truth?
topics.title_zh: 永远说实话才是最好的吗？

pro.en: People trust you when you're honest.
pro.zh: 诚实的人才被信任。

pro.en: One lie often needs more lies to hide it.
pro.zh: 一个谎要用更多谎来圆。

pro.en: The truth feels lighter than a secret.
pro.zh: 说实话比藏秘密轻松。

con.en: A kind 'white lie' can save someone's feelings.
con.zh: 善意的小谎能照顾别人心情。

con.en: Some hard truths are better said gently.
con.zh: 难听的实话该说得温和点。

con.en: Not every secret is yours to tell.
con.zh: 不是每个秘密都该由你说出。

topics.title_en: Is being famous better than being ordinary?
topics.title_zh: 出名比当普通人更好吗？

pro.en: Famous people can help many others.
pro.zh: 名人能帮助很多人。

pro.en: Fame can come from doing great work.
pro.zh: 名气可以来自了不起的成就。

pro.en: People listen to your ideas.
pro.zh: 你的想法有人听。

con.en: Famous people lose their privacy.
con.zh: 名人没有隐私。

con.en: Strangers judge everything you do.
con.zh: 陌生人对你做的每件事指指点点。

con.en: Ordinary life can be calm and happy.
con.zh: 平凡的生活可以安稳又幸福。

topics.title_en: Does money make people happy?
topics.title_zh: 钱能让人快乐吗？

pro.en: Money buys food, a home, and safety.
pro.zh: 钱能买食物、房子和安全感。

pro.en: It lets you help your family and others.
pro.zh: 能帮家人，也能帮别人。

pro.en: It opens doors to learning and travel.
pro.zh: 能换来学习和旅行的机会。

con.en: Friends and family matter more than money.
con.zh: 朋友和家人比钱更重要。

con.en: Rich people can still feel lonely.
con.zh: 有钱人也可能很孤单。

con.en: The best things — like love — are free.
con.zh: 最好的东西，比如爱，是免费的。

topics.title_en: Is it better to be smart or to be kind?
topics.title_zh: 聪明和善良，哪个更好？

pro.en: Smart people solve big, hard problems.
pro.zh: 聪明人能解决又大又难的问题。

pro.en: Being smart helps you learn anything fast.
pro.zh: 聪明让你学什么都快。

pro.en: Clever ideas can change the world.
pro.zh: 聪明的点子能改变世界。

con.en: Kindness makes everyone around you happy.
con.zh: 善良让身边的人都开心。

con.en: People remember how you treated them.
con.zh: 人们记得你怎么对待他们。

con.en: A kind person is never truly alone.
con.zh: 善良的人永远不会真正孤单。
